content.uploadFilesSelectTitle: Choose an electronic health record (EHR) notes to upload
uploadFilesBulletPoints: You can only upload a PDF file
If your file is not a PDF, you'll need to convert it to one before uploading
If there's a problem with your files during upload, you'll need to resolve these before continuing
chooseFilesWarningText: The electronic health record (EHR) notes contain the patient's personal details and all notes from their consultations and interactions with the practice or other healthcare providers. You may also call them the 'journal', 'practice notes' or a 'full EHR summary'.
They are downloaded as a single file from the clinical system.
The file does not include attachments such as letters or other documents. You'll be asked to upload those separately in the next step.
content.confirmFilesTitle: Check file is for the correct patient
